recommendations.overview: Anna suffers from agoraphobia so crippling that when a trio of criminals break into her house, she cannot bring herself to flee. But what the intruders don't realize is that agoraphobia is not her only psychosis.

recommendations.overview: An old man who has one interest in life, collecting butterflies, has his life changed by an eight year old girl.
